title: epilobium ciliatum subsp. glandulosum
intro: Epilobium ciliatum subsp. glandulosum, also known as the glandular willowherb, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the willowherb family (Onagraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to the presence of salicylic acid and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Epilobium ciliatum subsp. glandulosum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially alleviating symptoms of menopausal and osteoporotic conditions. Epilobium ciliatum subsp. glandulosum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional herbal medicine.
